member.name: T:AuthService.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: This is the authentication section for user manangement.

member.name: T:AuthService.Controllers.IngredientsController
member.summary: This controller concerns ingredient information and very important nutritional content

member.name: M:AuthService.Controllers.RecipeLikesController.GetLikeStatus(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get like status for current user and total count for likes of that recipe

member.name: M:AuthService.Controllers.RecipiesController.GetRecipeById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieving a recipe by its ID

member.name: M:AuthService.Controllers.RecipiesController.AddRecipe(AuthService.DTOs.AppDtos.RecipeDto.CreateRecipeDto)
member.summary: Creating recipe alongside the ingredients and instructions by a contributor
member.remarks: **The following are the operations here:** * Retrieving the authenticated user and verifying for authorization * Validating the required input fields to ensure they are input * Extrating the recipes and verifying availability before adding * Adding instruction fields to the intructions section in the model * Adding the recipe fields themselves accordingly
member.param: A DTO for the creation of the recipe

member.name: M:AuthService.Controllers.RecipiesController.UpdateRecipe(System.Int32,AuthService.DTOs.AppDtos.Recipe.UpdateRecipeDto)
member.summary: Updating the recipe alongside ingredients and instructions
member.remarks: **We are doing the following:** * Retrieving the authenticated user * Retrieving the recipe of interest by ID * Verifying the authenticated user owns the recipe to be updated * Verfying if the recipe of the searched Id exists * Modifying all fields as needed by the author
member.param: The Id of the recipe in In question
The DTO for updating a recipe with the various fields

member.name: M:AuthService.Services.Nutrition.INutritionCalculator.CalculateRecipeNutrition(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{AuthService.Models.AppModels.RecipeIngredient},System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates Nutritional information for a recipe
member.param: Collection of recipe ingredients with ingredient and unit loaded
Number of servings the recipe yields
member.returns: Complete nutrition results with total and per-serving values
